tactics.stateBefore:
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : Differentiable ℝ f
h : ∀ (x : ℝ), deriv f x = 0
⊢ ∃ c, ∀ (x : ℝ), f x = c

s : Set ℝ
hs : IsCompact s
⊢ IsClosed s ∧ ∃ b, ∀ x ∈ s, |x| ≤ b

x : ℕ → ℝ
c : ℝ
h : ∀ (n : ℕ), |x n| ≤ c
⊢ ∃ phi, StrictMono phi ∧ ∃ l, ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n > N, |x (phi n) - l| < ε

f : ℝ → ℝ
h : ContinuousOn f (Set.Icc (-π) π)
⊢ ∃ C, ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc (-π) π, |f x| ≤ C

x : ℕ → ℝ
c : ℝ
h_bound : ∀ (n : ℕ), x n ≤ c
h_mono : ∀ (n : ℕ), x n ≤ x (n + 1)
⊢ ∃ l, ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n > N, |x n - l| < ε
⊢ ∃ f, Continuous f ∧ (∀ (x : ℝ), f x ∈ Set.Icc 0 1) ∧ (∀ x ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, f x = 0) ∧ ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc 2 3, f x = 1

X : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : MetricSpace X
inst✝ : CompleteSpace X
U : ℕ → Set X
hU_open : ∀ (n : ℕ), IsOpen (U n)
hU_dense : ∀ (n : ℕ), Dense (U n)
⊢ Dense (⋂ n, U n)
⊢ ∀ ε > 0, ∃ p, ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc (-1) 1, |Polynomial.eval x p - |x|| < ε

f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
hBound : ∃ M, ∀ (n : ℕ), ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, |f n x| ≤ M
hEquicont : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ δ > 0, ∀ (n : ℕ) (x y : ℝ), x ∈ Set.Icc 0 1 → y ∈ Set.Icc 0 1 → |x - y| < δ → |f n x - f n y| < ε
⊢ ∃ phi,
    StrictMono phi ∧
      ∃ g, ContinuousOn g (Set.Icc 0 1) ∧ ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, |f (phi n) x - g x| < ε

f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : BoundedVariationOn f (Set.Icc 0 2)
⊢ ∃ g h, MonotoneOn g (Set.Icc 0 2) ∧ MonotoneOn h (Set.Icc 0 2) ∧ ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc 0 2, f x = g x - h x

a : ℕ → ℝ
h_nonneg : ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 ≤ a n
h_sum : Summable a
⊢ Summable fun n => a n ^ 2

α : Type u_1
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace α
μ : Measure α
inst✝² : SigmaFinite μ
p q : ENNReal
inst✝¹ : Fact (1 ≤ p)
inst✝ : Fact (1 ≤ q)
hp1 : 1 < p.toReal
hp2 : p ≠ ⊤
hp3 : 1 < p
hq1 : 1 < q.toReal
hq2 : q ≠ ⊤
hconj : 1 / p.toReal + 1 / q.toReal = 1
⊢ ∃ Phi, True
⊢ ∃ μ, ∀ (f : ℝ → ℝ), ContinuousOn f (Set.Icc 0 1) → ∫ (x : ℝ) in Set.Icc 0 1, f x = ∫ (x : ℝ), f x ∂μ

μ : Measure ℝ
f_seq : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
f : ℝ → ℝ
hUI : UnifIntegrable f_seq 1 (μ.restrict (Set.Icc 0 1))
h_ae : ∀ᵐ (x : ℝ) ∂μ.restrict (Set.Icc 0 1), ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, |f_seq n x - f x| < ε
⊢ IntegrableOn f (Set.Icc 0 1) μ

μ : Measure ℝ
⊢ ∃ T,
    (∀ (n : ℕ) (f : ↥(Lp ℝ 2 μ)), ∀ᵐ (x : ℝ) ∂μ, ↑↑((T n) f) x = (1 + sin (↑n * x) / ↑n) * ↑↑f x) ∧
      ∃ M, ∀ (n : ℕ) (f : ↥(Lp ℝ 2 μ)), ‖(T n) f‖ ≤ M * ‖f‖
⊢ ∃ f, (∀ ⦃u v : ℝ⦄, u ≠ v → |f u - f v| < |u - v|) ∧ ¬∃ x, f x = x

X : Type u_1
inst✝² : MetricSpace X
inst✝¹ : CompactSpace X
inst✝ : Nonempty X
f : X → X
h : ∀ (u v : X), u ≠ v → Dist.dist (f u) (f v) < Dist.dist u v
⊢ ∃ x, f x = x

f : ℝ → ℝ
hcont : ContinuousOn f (Set.Icc 0 1)
h0 : f 0 < 0
h1 : 0 < f 1
⊢ ∃ c ∈ Set.Ioo 0 1, f c = 0

⊢ ∀ (X : Type u_1) (x : MetricSpace X),
    CompleteSpace X → ∀ (u : ℕ → X), CauchySeq u → ∃ x_1, ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, Dist.dist (u n) x_1 < ε
⊢ ∃ f g, (∀ (n : ℕ), Continuous (f n)) ∧ (∀ (x : ℝ), Tendsto (fun n => f n x) atTop (𝓝 (g x))) ∧ ¬Continuous g

𝕜 : Type u_1
X : Type u_2
Y : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : NormedField 𝕜
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup X
inst✝³ : NormedSpace 𝕜 X
inst✝² : CompleteSpace X
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup Y
inst✝ : NormedSpace 𝕜 Y
Tn : ℕ → X →L[𝕜] Y
T : X → Y
hconv : ∀ (x : X), Tendsto (fun n => (Tn n) x) atTop (𝓝 (T x))
⊢ ∃ S, ∀ (x : X), S x = T x

a b : ℝ
h : a < b
⊢ ¬Nonempty ((↥(Lp ℝ ⊤ (volume.restrict (Set.Icc a b))) →L[ℝ] ℝ) ≃ₗᵢ[ℝ] ↥(Lp ℝ 1 (volume.restrict (Set.Icc a b))))
